text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Spring Fan Fest is here, and ardent fans from
far and wide have flocked to Tracen Academy to
glimpse this year's active Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Host
text_block_list.text:
The final round of the 34th annual speed-eating
grand prix is underway! Our last food for the
contest is taiyaki!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Host
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Oguri Cap! Her presence is as
overwhelming as ever—could she be signaling
she's finished her portion already?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've run out of tea. Do you know where I might be
able to get some more?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This dessert is delicious, so it would be a shame
not to enjoy it with some warm tea...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Host
text_block_list.text:
And Oguri Cap has walked off! Does she not
understand what the goal of the contest is?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Host
text_block_list.text:
First place is in sight for Super Creek! ...But wait!
Another Umamusume is surging forward toward
the top spot!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Come on, this is no time to be givin' up!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Host
text_block_list.text:
And the win goes to Inari One! Oguri's iron
stomach has finally met its match!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Heh... Witness the power... of Edo...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Inari, stay with us! It's Mommy. Can you hear me?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...No. You're not my mommy...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That was a good contest! I never thought Oguri
Cap would lose!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Yeah! That Inari is pretty strong—I heard
she's gonna run in the Takarazuka Kinen too!
...Ouch! Hey, you're stepping on my foot!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Ack! I'm sorry! Did I hurt you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-this place is packed! I can't believe how
popular the Top Three are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"The Top Three"—Oguri Cap, Inari One, and
Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Skilled and powerful, it's no wonder they're
popular, both here at the Fan Fest and in general.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Perhaps gluttony is the secret to their strength...
choice_data_list: What kind of reasoning is that?
What kind of reasoning is that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know what they say! Hunger rests for no
one! Maybe there's another contest that's still
looking for participants!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Register here for the Trainer and Me Eating
Contest!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow... I see... This sure is a lot...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the table in front of us is a mountain of hot
dogs.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
The current record is fifteen! And we're offering a
special edition Tracen Academy miniature car to
anyone who can break it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ooh... That's a nice prize...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprised by Sakura Chiyono O's unusual interest,
I prepare to start eating hot dogs.
choice_data_list:
If it's only fifteen, I guess we might be able to
break the record...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a plan! Let's aim for sixteen plates of
hot dogs then!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. They count the number of plates after you
finish, and each plate has ten hot dogs.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If we want to break the record, we'll need to eat
more than fifteen plates... So we've gotta aim for
160 hot dogs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can probably eat about 150 hot dogs of this
size, so you just need to eat ten, please and
thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The gong to start rings...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Chomp! Munch!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Hm?! Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look to my side to see that Sakura Chiyono O
has ground to a halt. She's staring intently at the
plates with a strained expression.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Haha... I'm fine... Just... forty hot dogs... to
go...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I can do it... After all... I usually eat... way more
than this...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hurgh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Whew. See? I'm perfectly... fine...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Heh. Hehe... Urk...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see any option but to quit. I stop Sakura
Chiyono O from eating any more and rush her to
the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The gong to start rings...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Chomp! Munch!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whew! I'll leave the rest to you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a satisfied look on her face, Sakura Chiyono
O gives the remaining hot dogs to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've managed to eat eight hot dogs myself so far,
which means there are only...
choice_data_list: Why are there still twelve left?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
S-Sorry! I'm just so full... I can usually eat so much
more than this...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the look on Sakura Chiyono O's face,
she's already gone past her limit. And if that's the
case, there's only one thing I can do...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by Sakura Chiyono O's enthusiastic
cheering, I somehow manage to keep shoveling
hot dogs into my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And finally...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There you have it, folks! Sakura Chiyono O and
her trainer have broken the record! Here's your
prize!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you so much! Aw, it's a little sedan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing the smile on Sakura Chiyono O's
face, I promptly pass out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Omigosh! Trainer?! Traineeer!
